name: foundation_control_schema
lock_risk: Creates a new empty foundation schema and control tables; it does not lock an existing product table.
representative_data: Runs against an empty database and a version-zero snapshot because no product schema exists before S05.
query_plan_review: No data-reading or data-rewriting statement exists; query-plan review is not applicable.
space_risk: Two empty control tables and their primary-key indexes only.
forward_fix: Add a new ordered migration; never edit this released migration.
rollback: Before release only, drop the empty atlas_foundation schema. After release, use a reviewed forward fix.
